question: List the detail and id of the teacher who teaches the most courses.
sql: SELECT Teachers.teacher_id, Teachers.teacher_details FROM Teachers JOIN Classes ON Teachers.teacher_id = Classes.teacher_id GROUP BY Teachers.teacher_id ORDER BY COUNT(Classes.class_id) DESC LIMIT 1;

back_translation.intent: 查找拥有最多班级的教师及其详细信息

semantic.reason: 语义完全一致，原始问题要求列出教最多课程的教师的详细信息和ID，SQL反向翻译描述正确地使用了Teachers表和Classes表，通过COUNT(Classes.class_id)进行聚合，按teacher_id分组，并按课程数量降序排序，最后取第一条记录。
